case_title: AMERIPRISE INSURANCE COMPANY VS. DAVID PRYOR et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE TO PLAINTIFF
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-05-2010 CONTINUED TO DEC-17-2010 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-17-2010 CONTINUED TO JAN-28-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
***DEFAULT AND/OR DEFAULT JUDGMENT RECEIVED THIS DATE FOR PROCESSING***
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF AMERIPRISE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT PRYOR, DAVID

SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERIPRISE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT PRYOR, DAVID DOES 1 THRU 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-05-2010 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-07-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-21-2010
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PRYOR, DAVID
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMERIPRISE INSURANCE COMPANY IN SUPPORT OF THE APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERIPRISE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERIPRISE INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2011 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JAN-28-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-27-2011 CONTINUED TO SEP-14-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE JUL-27-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $271.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $6,600.00 AS TO DEFENDANT PRYOR, DAVID
DECLARATION OF MICHAEL S. MORSE, COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF, AMERIPRISE INSURACE COMPANY IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERIPRISE INSURANCE COMPANY
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF FEB-17-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERIPRISE INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED JUL-23-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PRYOR, DAVID

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR DEC-16-2011 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). THE SEP-14-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERIPRISE INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRYOR, DAVID $3,052.76 PRINCIPAL, $271.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,323.76, SEE SCANNED DOC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-27-2011 CONTINUED TO JUL-27-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE APR-27-2011 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERIPRISE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT PRYOR, DAVID
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-16-2011 CONTINUED TO FEB-17-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY MORSE, MICHAEL S.
